fields.label: In-house Safety Rules and Regulations briefed to workers?
Has the required PPE issued to workers? (Safety Belt, Safety Harness, etc)
Ensure when there is potential falling hazard, safety harness and additional lift line were provided.
Lift line was firmly secured to rigid structure when necessary.
Workers were briefed to hook their safety belt or harness to secured point (life line, structure, etc)
Work area below to be barricade with danger signboard to prevent entry.
Check to ensure safety belt or harness is not defective.
